channel.title: LobangKing.sg — Singapore Lobangs
channel.description: Verified daily promos, freebies and discounts across Singapore.

item.title: FairPrice 50% Off Ice Cream Deals Haagen-Dazs Crispy Sandwich, Ben & Jerry’s and other deals until 15 Jul 2026
item.description: Savings on premium ice cream and selected grocery favourites

item.title: McDonald’s S’pore New Spider-Man Happy Meal Toys & Readers Book Till 12 Aug 2026
item.description: Collect new Spider-Man toy designs weekly, or choose the Spider-Man Readers book.

item.title: F&N New MAGNOLIA HERSHEY’S Matcha Almond Stick Ice Cream from 10 July 2026
item.description: Experience the earthy notes of quality Japanese matcha paired with roasted almonds and velvety chocolate

item.title: Cold Storage Selling Ben & Jerry’s at 3-for-$25 & Other Deals till 15 Jul 2026
item.description: Big savings on Ben & Jerry's, snacks, pantry essentials and more

item.title: Nestlé Ice Cream Singapore Blind Box Plushie Giveaway
item.description: Collect five adorable limited-edition Nestlé Ice Cream plushies

item.title: S$3 Off Selected Eggs & Rice Every Saturday with DBS/POSB Cards (18 Jul to 29 Aug 2026)
item.description: Stretch grocery savings with instant discounts on selected eggs and rice

item.title: LovethatBag Singapore Branded Bag Sale from 10 to 15 Jul 2026
item.description: Designer handbags from sought-after brands at attractive prices

item.title: Decathlon Singapore hosting second-hand bike festival with refurbished bikes up to 80% off - CNA Lifestyle
item.description: Decathlon Singapore hosting second-hand bike festival with refurbished bikes up to 80% off CNA Lifestyle

item.title: Subway Singapore Brings Back Chilli Crab Sub with New Black Pepper Crab Rival from July 22
item.description: National Day flavours are back at Subway Singapore.

item.title: Join the Easy Mode Club: A Fuss-Free Way to Try the Galaxy S26 Ultra - Samsung Global Newsroom
item.description: Join the Easy Mode Club: A Fuss-Free Way to Try the Galaxy S26 Ultra Samsung Global Newsroom

item.title: Starbucks Singapore 1-for-1 Shopee deals from 7 July 2026
item.description: Enjoy selected venti Starbucks favourites at 1-for-1 prices

item.title: McDonald’s S’pore and Old Chang Kee To Debut All-New Curry Burgers From 9 July 2026
item.description: Two Singapore favourites. One bold National Day collaboration.

item.title: Razer Gaming Headphones Now 31% Off - HardwareZone
item.description: Razer Gaming Headphones Now 31% Off HardwareZone

item.title: Up to 70% off selected items at Don Don Donki till 19 Jul - SETHLUI.com

item.title: MUJI Jewel Changi Airport Has An Ongoing Clearance Sale of Up To 70% Off Homeware & Clothing - Uchify

item.title: MUJI Online Exclusive Sale Just Dropped with Up to 40% OFF Home and Living Picks Till April 30 - Great Deals Singapore

item.description: MUJI Singapore’s Cacao Truffles Are Now 40% OFF, With Hazelnut, Salt Caramel and More Great Deals Singapore

item.title: Nike Singapore End of Season Sale Adds Further Markdowns with Extra 30% OFF Till April 26 - Great Deals Singapore
item.description: Nike Singapore End of Season Sale Adds Further Markdowns with Extra 30% OFF Till April 26 Great Deals Singapore

item.title: Moomoo Free Apple Stock: Is It Still Offered in Singapore? - Moomoo
item.description: Moomoo Free Apple Stock: Is It Still Offered in Singapore? Moomoo

item.title: Cotton On Isn’t Leaving SG Anytime Soon & You Can Swing By This Weekend For Free Matcha To Celebrate - TheSmartLocal
item.description: Cotton On Isn’t Leaving SG Anytime Soon & You Can Swing By This Weekend For Free Matcha To Celebrate TheSmartLocal

item.title: Cotton On Reaffirms Singapore Presence With FREE Matcha Treat at 5 Stores on April 4–5 - Great Deals Singapore
item.description: Cotton On Reaffirms Singapore Presence With FREE Matcha Treat at 5 Stores on April 4–5 Great Deals Singapore

item.title: 30 Best Pickleball Courts In Singapore (+ Free Courts & Places From $3.30/Hour!) - Sassy Mama Singapore
item.description: 30 Best Pickleball Courts In Singapore (+ Free Courts & Places From $3.30/Hour!) Sassy Mama Singapore

item.title: KFC World Cup 2026 Deals: New Champions Meals & Free Gifts - Confirm Good
item.description: KFC World Cup 2026 Deals: New Champions Meals & Free Gifts Confirm Good

item.title: Subway Singapore Giving FREE Cookie With Every Sub Purchase This Ramadan Till March 21 - Great Deals Singapore
item.description: Subway Singapore Giving FREE Cookie With Every Sub Purchase This Ramadan Till March 21 Great Deals Singapore

item.title: Up to 55% off designer handbags, shoes & watches
item.description: Official Michael Kors sale with further reductions across designer handbags, shoes, watches and clothing — over 1,000 styles. Example: the Ava extra-small Saffiano crossbody is down from $430 to $189.

item.title: Designer leather bags on sale + free shipping
item.description: Coach Singapore's official leather bag sale — exclusive deals on handbags and signature styles, with free shipping for a limited time. New customers get 10% off their first order with code HELLO10.

item.title: Up to 50% off makeup, skincare & fragrance
item.description: Sephora's ongoing sale takes up to 50% off across makeup, skincare, fragrance and hair — including Sephora Collection (40–60% off) plus Sulwhasoo, Laneige and Caudalie. New app users get an extra 10% off their first purchase with code APP10.

item.title: Limited-time voucher on selected tech & appliances
item.description: Limited-time online voucher on selected products (valid 22 Jun to 26 Jul), running alongside the in-store Monster-Sized Sale of 8% off your 1st item and 10% off your 2nd.
